symptom: 81% of the corpus lexicon (166143/204266 rows) hallucinated against untranslated '…' verses
root_cause: pairs_of() tested ru truthiness; '…' is truthy
fix: has_cyr() guard in pairs_of + write-step + build_strata; purge to 26277 genuine rows

good.source_ru: Когда Карна так обратился к Дроне…

lesson: truthiness != translated; a real rendering must contain Cyrillic

symptom: last commentary footnote overwrote the real verse translation

bad.detail: group keyed by lang → seg=comm* clobbered seg=ru

fix: key by seg; emit translation + commentary tagged by kind
lesson: distinguish the verse translation from editorial notes

symptom: √ leaked into the SLP1 key, making it unjoinable (~0.07% rows)
each of up to 32 commentary notes emitted separately → frequency inflated 13-44x
root_cause: no collapse across a group's commentary units

symptom: Ṛgveda marked harvestable while the lexicon had 0 Ṛgvedic rows → silent fallback to Epic Russian
root_cause: harvestable derived from strata membership, not actual coverage
fix: corpus_harvest.py coverage flags EMPTY/thin; gate assembly on real coverage
lesson: disclose coverage; never present an era mismatch as fact

symptom: full-corpus cost extrapolated from comment-dense Atharvaveda → $260 scare
(a) frozen ThreadPool gave bogus 25h ETA; (b) a dead build (gone ~4h) missed by checking row count not file freshness

bad.detail: trusted elapsed time on a frozen/append-only file

root_cause: no read-timeout; liveness judged by row count
fix: timeout=(10,60); _watch.py live window + stall detect; verify mtime
lesson: verify the build is WRITING (mtime), never trust elapsed time on a frozen file

symptom: LLM card not reproducible; copyrighted glosses in body; LLM verdict final with no human queue

bad.detail: no model_id/prompt_sha/commit; Кочергина/Смирнов/Фриш verbatim in card body; zero reviewers

root_cause: reproducibility, rights, and human-in-the-loop not modelled
fix: provenance stamping; corpus_gate.RIGHTS + publishable flag + CC BY-SA 4.0; review_status + run_batch.py review

good.detail: every card stamped + rights-gated; 11 cards in a severity-sorted human queue

lesson: a printed scholarly edition needs provenance, rights, and a human gate

symptom: ~9% of headwords silently lost; retry reports "all done" while files missing

bad.detail: aMSa.json==AMSa.json on NTFS; 2nd SLP1 case-variant skipped as already-done; 1795 groups / 2311 a-headwords dropped; 8-worker os.replace last-writer-wins

root_cause: SLP1 case-sensitive keys used as filenames on a case-insensitive filesystem
fix: safe_name() encodes uppercase as _+lower (injective, all-lowercase); proven 24621->24621 distinct; migrate by internal key1; re-fetch victims

good.detail: a-section 24621/24621 zero collisions; caught on 15% sample before scaling to 167990 (~15k would have been lost)

lesson: never use case-sensitive ids as filenames on a case-insensitive FS; a clean completion can mask silent loss — audit the sample before scaling

symptom: translator narrates WHY a layer changed (unsourced intent) + mislabels an existing sense as [new]

bad.detail: anna pilot: "[PW] omits Sonne as unreliable" (PW gives no reason); PW sense 2c Wolke framed as "[PW new]" and duplicated

root_cause: model invents editorial meta-narration; content all verified real (1349 CE, Geldner, King Anaka genuinely in NWS)
fix: 6_merged_translate.md guards 1-2: attribute facts not motives; no [new] label without checking earlier layer; no re-listing

good.detail: card states only what each layer carries (PWG m.+n. / PW n. / NWS re-adds m.); no invented motive or phantom new sense

lesson: fabrication includes the editorial STORY, not just citations — judge for unsourced intent too

symptom: NWS condensed format TAG>gloss..SOURCE:page> parsed as SOURCE>TAG>gloss; every sub-source label slid forward one entry; Grassmann gloss dropped

bad.detail: aMSa re-pass: numerator credited Olivelle (true Keller 2006:198); shoulder credited Keller (true Hoernle 1908:241); tantric credited Hoernle (true TAK 1:73); inheritance credited Meyer (true Olivelle 2015:1); territorial credited BHSD (true Sircar 1966:18) — ~15 sub-sources mis-paired

root_cause: ambiguous reading-direction of condensed citation; citation CLOSES the gloss (comes after), not before. Opus judge inherited same misparse and false-cleared severity 1
fix: 6_merged_translate.md guard 6: pair each gloss with the source that FOLLOWS it; sanity-check by author specialty (Keller=math, Hoernle=medical Bower Ms, Olivelle=Arthasastra, TAK=Tantrabhidhanakosa, BHSD=Buddhist, Sircar=epigraphy). Rebuilt from explicit pre-parsed owner map src/pilot/_aMSa_nws_correct_parse.md

good.detail: all 17 NWS entries own true gloss: Keller=numerator, Hoernle=shoulder, TAK=tantric, Olivelle=inheritance, BHSD=Buddhist time, Sircar=territorial; Grassmann restored; partly-duplicate collapsed

lesson: a wrong reading-direction guess yields a systematic off-by-one that looks locally perfect; the QA judge can inherit the same blind spot, so arm the judge with the parse rule and disambiguate with an independent signal (author field). anna immune because its NWS entries lead with a literal lemma
